inputs.name: q
inputs.desc: Query tensor [heads, tokens, head_dim] rotated in-place

inputs.name: k
inputs.desc: Key tensor [kv_heads, tokens, head_dim] rotated in-place

params.name: aligned_head_dim
params.desc: Aligned head dimension for scratch row stride

params.name: pos_offset
params.desc: Starting text position for the current token slice

params.name: n_dims
params.desc: Rotary width used by the text M-RoPE kernel

params.name: n_ctx_orig
params.desc: Original context length for YaRN-style scaling

impl.c_declaration: void mrope_qk_text(float *q, float *k, int num_heads, int num_kv_heads, int num_tokens, int head_dim, int aligned_head_dim, int pos_offset, int n_dims, int section_0, int section_1, int section_2, int section_3, int n_ctx_orig, float freq_base, float freq_scale, float ext_factor, float attn_factor, float beta_fast, float beta_slow);

notes: Text multi-section RoPE for Q/K using implicit 1D positions expanded to the four-stream GGML contract.
